caption: A panel discussion takes place in a professional setting featuring a backdrop with the "IIEA" logo and the text "The Institute of International and European Affairs." Two men in dark suits and ties sit at a long table equipped with microphones, water bottles, and glasses. One man, wearing glasses and a red tie, is seen looking down at papers and adjusting his cuff. The second man, an older gentleman with light hair, listens and speaks. A nameplate on the table identifies "Noel Fahey Event Chair." In the upper right frame, a blue graphic overlay appears containing the name "Joseph Quinlan" and the title "The End of the West? the stakes for the US and Europe in a world of disorder," dated "15 June 2017." The bottom of each frame displays the website "iiea.com." The sequence captures the men shifting their posture and focusing on the documents before them.
